_comment: KUMPLY Compliance L1 — Subnet-EVM genesis (ACP-77 compliant)
_chainId: 43210 reserved for the KUMPLY Compliance L1 (Fuji-testnet variant: 432103)

feeConfig._comment: Low fees — compliance reads should be near-free for institutional usage

warpConfig._comment: Warp Messaging enabled at genesis — required for ACP-77 P-Chain communication and cross-L1 attestation propagation

contractDeployerAllowListConfig._comment: Only KYB-verified institutions (resolved off-chain at deploy time) may deploy contracts. Admin = KUMPLY deployer wallet (Tier 4/KYB attested in AttestationStore on C-Chain). Admin can grant deploy rights to additional KYB-verified addresses post-genesis via setEnabled.

contractNativeMinterConfig._comment: Disabled at genesis — KMP gas token has fixed initial allocation

txAllowListConfig._comment: Disabled — any wallet can transact. Validator-set membership is enforced separately via KumplyValidatorSetManager

alloc._comment_purpose: FUJI TESTNET ONLY. KMP has no market value and is non-tradable in this deployment. Mainnet KMP allocation is explicitly NOT defined here — it will be set by KUMPLY governance at L1 mainnet launch, after (a) on-chain traction is demonstrated, (b) institutional validator agreements are formalized, and (c) a written Mexican fintech-law opinion confirms the software-only positioning of the protocol.
alloc._comment_supply: Total testnet supply = 1,000,000,000 KMP (1e9 * 1e18 wei = 1e27 wei = 0x33B2E3C9FD0803CE8000000). 100% allocated to the deployer/operator wallet for testnet operations (faucet distribution, demo grants, hackathon stipends, validator gas top-ups).
alloc._comment_legal: This genesis allocation is a testnet operational choice, NOT a binding mainnet tokenomics commitment. KMP is not an investment instrument, not e-money under LRITF Art. 22, not a virtual asset offered for exchange under LFPIORPI Art. 17 fracción XVI. See LEGAL_REVIEW_BRIEF.md (gitignored, internal) for the pending counsel scope.
